zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford於1105年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿希布恩時，他的父親Nigel de Stafford37歲，母親Amicia de Ferrers35歲。他於大約1133年與Margaret de Bupton在英國英格蘭德比夏爾隆福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1166年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾隆福德享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gresley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Greasley
meanings: 1  English: locative name, usually from Greasley (Notts) but possibly also from Gresley (Derbys). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2), particularly the Lancs examples.

2 Norman, English: nickname, either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’. In early forms, the nickname has sometimes been confused with the place-name in (1). Compare Le Gresley in Jersey and Greslé, Grêlé in France.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford was born in 1105, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nigel de Stafford, was 37 and his mother, Amicia de Ferrers, was 35. He married Margaret de Bupton about 1133, in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1166, in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Englan: Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford est né en 1105, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nigel de Stafford, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Amicia de Ferrers, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Bupton environ 1133, à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1166, à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

Er hat um 1133 in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Bupton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longfordが1105年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで生まれた時，父Nigel de Staffordは37歳，母Amicia de Ferrersは35歳であった。約1133年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードでMargaret de Buptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1166年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードで61歳で死去した。

ko.Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버턴 업 트렌트
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford(이)가 1105년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애스h보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nigel de Stafford(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Amicia de Ferrers(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1133년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 론그퍼드에서 Margaret de Bupton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1166년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 론그퍼드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford nasceu em 1105, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nigel de Stafford, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Amicia de Ferrers, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Bupton aproximadamente 1133, em Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Englan: буртон упон трент, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford родился в 1105 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nigel de Stafford было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Amicia de Ferrers, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Bupton около 1133 г. в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1166 г. в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

Se casó con Margaret de Bupton aproximadamente 1133, en Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija.
